name: Orange Chicken II
recipeInstructions:
1. PREPARATION: Cut chicken into pieces that are about three-quarters of an inch.
Mix marinade.
Add chicken.
2. Marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Shred the orange peel.
Fine chop green onion.
Mince ginger.
4. MIX SAUCE.
5. COOKING:
Heat two tablespoons oil in a wok over high heat.
Stir-fry chicken for 2-3 minutes until it is white and firm.
Remove from the wok and wipe clean.
Heat one tablespoon oil over high heat.
Stir-fry dried peppers until they are dark red.
Reduce temperature to medium.
Stir-fry orange peel, green onion, and ginger until aroma comes (about 1 minute).
Raise temperature to high.
Add sauce. Bring to a boil.
Return chicken to the wok. Stir-fry until well mixed and heated through.
